executives.name: Bilal Khan
executives.background: Bilal Khan has served as a member of our Board since October 2020. Mr. Khan is a Senior Managing Director at Blackstone in the Private Equity Group.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Managing Director, Private Equity Group

executives.name: David Calhoun
executives.background: Former President and CEO of The Boeing Company; former Executive Chairman of Nielsen Holdings plc.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Managing Director and Head of Portfolio Operations

executives.name: Kelly Ayotte
executives.background: Former U.S. Senator for New Hampshire and former Attorney General of New Hampshire.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Ruth Porat
executives.background: Ruth Porat has served as the President and Chief Investment Officer of Alphabet and Google since September 2023, and as the Chief Financial Officer of Alphabet and Google since May 2015. Prior to joining Google, she was at Morgan Stanley, where she served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer from 2010 to 2015.

executives.name: William Parrett
executives.background: Former CEO of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors
